sections.description:
Visual WAF rule builder, DNS manager, zone analytics, IP access rules, cache purge, zone controls, and security event viewer — all powered by the Cloudflare API, directly from your WordPress admin.

Features:
  • WAF Rules Builder — deploy 5 battle-tested security rules to any zone in one click
  • DNS Manager — full DNS record management with all 21 Cloudflare record types
  • Zone Analytics — requests, bandwidth, cache rate, pageviews, and threats per zone
  • Zone Controls — Under Attack mode, Dev Mode, cache purge, SSL, security level, and more
  • IP Access Rules — account-wide allowlist and blocklist by IP, range, country, or ASN
  • Security Events — view recent firewall events per zone (Pro plan zones)
  • Multi-account support — manage multiple Cloudflare accounts from one dashboard
sections.installation:
1. Upload the wpwafmanager folder to /wp-content/plugins/ or install via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin
  2. Activate the plugin via Plugins → Installed Plugins
  3. Go to WAF Manager in the admin sidebar
  4. Enter your Cloudflare API Token and click Verify & Save
  5. Navigate to WAF Manager → License and enter your license key to activate auto-updates
sections.changelog:
1.0.3 — April 2026

  • Fixed: Destination addresses failing to sync for users with scoped API tokens. The plugin now resolves the Cloudflare account ID from the selected zone (Zone → Zone → Read) instead of relying on the Accounts endpoint, which requires broader token permissions many users do not grant.

1.0.2 — April 2026

  • Rule 1: Added Usercentrics (Usercentricsbot) as an individual opt-in under Website Monitoring Services. Rule expressions sourced from WAFRules.com.
  • Rule 5: Split Internet Utilities (ASNs 206092, 206074, 206164, 206150, 210277) into its own toggle, separate from OVH France (ASN 16276 only). Both remain enabled by default.

1.0.1 — April 2026

  • Deploy now performs a clean replace — existing rules are deleted and only the newly configured rules are written, preventing stale or duplicate rules from accumulating.
  • Challenge All VPN Connections toggle now selects all individual VPN providers when checked and deselects all of them when unchecked.

1.0.0 — April 2026

  • Initial public release.
  • WAF Rules Builder with 5 battle-tested rules based on the wafrules.com ruleset.
  • DNS Manager with all 21 Cloudflare record types.
  • Zone Analytics dashboard powered by the Cloudflare GraphQL API.
  • Zone Controls — Under Attack mode, Dev Mode, cache purge, SSL mode, security level, cache level, browser cache TTL, Rocket Loader, hotlink protection, and email obfuscation.
  • IP Access Rules — account-wide allowlist and blocklist.
  • Security Events viewer (Pro plan zones).
  • Multi-account support with credential obfuscation and auto-expiry.
sections.frequently asked questions:
Does this work on Cloudflare Free plans?

Yes for all features except Security Events, which requires a Cloudflare Pro plan or higher.

What API Token permissions do I need?

Zone → WAF → Edit, Zone → Zone → Read, Zone → DNS → Edit, and Account → Firewall Services → Edit (for IP Access Rules).

Can I manage multiple client sites?

Yes. Use the multi-account feature to connect multiple Cloudflare accounts and switch between them from the dashboard.

Where can I get the free version?

The full plugin is free and open-source on GitHub. The Pro version adds automatic updates in WordPress admin and priority support.
